data.content: Per-beat disclosure toggle implemented. Each RetakeRow now owns its own collapse state (default false) with a ChevronRight disclosure button. Steps, notes, and handoff capsules are all gated behind the toggle; only description remains always visible. Page-level Switch removed. Tests updated to verify per-row control, default-collapsed state, and steps/notes/capsules gating. All quality gates pass (0 lint errors, tsc clean, 2097 tests pass, build succeeds). Commit e700cca0 pushed to origin/main.
